intended_use: icobrain ctp is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including but not limited to physicians and medical technicians. The software runs on a standard "off-the-shel
intended_use_full: icobrain ctp is an image processing software package to be used by trained professionals, including but not limited to physicians and medical technicians. The software runs on a standard "off-the-shelf" computer or a virtual platform, such as VMware, and can be used to perform image processing, analysis, and communication of computed tomography (CT) perfusion scans of the brain. Data and images are acquired through DICOM-compliant imaging devices. icobrain ctp provides both analysis and communication capabilities for dynamic imaging datasets that are acquired with CT Perfusion imaging protocols. Analysis includes calculation of parameters related to tissue flow (perfusion) and tissue blood volume. Results of image processing which include CT perfusion parameter maps generated from a raw CTP scan are exported in the standard DICOM format and may be viewed on existing radiological imaging viewers.
target_condition: acute stroke (implied from clinical dataset of stroke patients and perfusion parameter analysis)
ground_truth: Digital phantom with simulated tracer kinetic theory providing ground truth perfusion parameters (CBV, CBF, MTT); manually delineated DWI images for CBF abnormality volume; manually annotated ROI for tissue segmentation
other_metrics: Correlation >0.90 for each perfusion parameter on digital phantom; percentile 90 absolute difference and mean relative difference reported for validation experiments; all experiments passed acceptance criteria based on p90 volume differences
